name: Resolve Many-to-Many Relationships
description: Decompose a flat book-author table into a normalized schema with a junction table

checks.name: authors has 5 distinct authors
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM authors;
checks.description: 5 unique authors: Ralph Kimball, Margy Ross, Martin Kleppmann, Len Silverston, Paul Agnew

checks.name: books has 4 books
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM books;

checks.name: book_authors has 6 relationships
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM book_authors;

checks.name: Ralph Kimball has 2 books
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM book_authors ba JOIN authors a ON ba.author_id = a.author_id WHERE a.author_name = 'Ralph Kimball';
